creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
I can confirm that this is related to update 2.3.0 -> 2.3.1 as pcsc-lite-2.3.0,2 does not have this problem (installed cached package with pkg add -f from /var/cache/pkg).

I have tried to play with /usr/local/etc/polkit-1/rules.d/ from other os as solutions but that does not seem to work. Maybe some change in the /usr/local/share/polkit-1/actions/*.policy ?
